shellCommands.command: pwd && ls -la && find . -maxdepth 3 -type f | sed 's#^./##' | sort | head -200

find node_modules/next/dist/docs -maxdepth 2 -type f | sed 's#^#/#' | head -100 && echo '---' && cat package.json && echo '---' && sed -n '1,220p' app/page.tsx && echo '---' && sed -n '1,220p' lib/db.js

sed -n '1,220p' node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/03-api-reference/04-functions/revalidateTag.mdx && echo '---' && sed -n '1,220p' node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/03-api-reference/04-functions/updateTag.mdx && echo '---' && sed -n '1,220p' node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/03-api-reference/04-functions/cacheTag.mdx && echo '---' && cat next.config.ts
